name: tawk.to
description: tawk.to is a free live chat platform for websites. Its REST API lets you manage properties, chat conversations, support tickets, visitors, webhooks, team members, knowledge base articles, and chat widgets programmatically.

capabilities.name: properties_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all properties (websites/apps) associated with your tawk.to account.

capabilities.name: chats_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of chat conversations for a property with optional date and status filters.

capabilities.name: chats_get
capabilities.description: Fetch the full details and message transcript for a specific chat session.

capabilities.name: tickets_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve support tickets for a property with filtering by status, date range, and sorting.

capabilities.name: tickets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new support ticket for a property.

capabilities.name: visitors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific visitor including name, email, location, and browsing history.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send a message to an active chat conversation as an agent.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured webhooks for a property.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook subscription to receive real-time event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription for a property.

capabilities.name: members_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of team members (agents) for a property.

capabilities.name: knowledgebase_articles_list
capabilities.description: List knowledge base articles for a property.

capabilities.name: knowledgebase_articles_create
capabilities.description: Create a new knowledge base article for a property.

capabilities.name: widgets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new chat widget configuration for a property.
